title: Compounded Advantage in Real Estate: A Tale of Two Neighborhoods in Greensboro
author: Yodit Kifle
excerpt: How decades of policy turned two Greensboro neighborhoods into a study in compounded advantage — and disadvantage.
body: How decades of policy turned two Greensboro neighborhoods into a study in compounded advantage — and disadvantage.

title: Dr. James Sistrunk and the Legacy of Black Wall Street in Broward County
author: Yodit Kifle
excerpt: The story of Dr. James Sistrunk and a thriving Black business district — and what happened to the wealth it built.
body: The story of Dr. James Sistrunk and a thriving Black business district — and what happened to the wealth it built.

title: The New Deal and Racial Exclusion: A Lasting Divide in Infrastructure Opportunities
author: Yodit Kifle
excerpt: How New Deal programs built the American middle class — while writing racial exclusion into the foundation.
body: How New Deal programs built the American middle class — while writing racial exclusion into the foundation.
